name: TriGolf - Home of First Tee  Triangle
about: TriGolf is a premier golf facility operated by First Tee — Triangle, blending top-notch amenities with a community-focused mission. The venue features a 32,000 sq. ft. Himalayas-style putting green with an 18-hole putting course, a 28-bay driving range equipped with Toptracer Technology, and two indoor/outdoor simulator bays using Trackman Radar Technology. A 9-hole par-3 course designed by Gil Hanse is set to open in September 2025. The facility caters to golfers of all skill levels through memberships, lessons, leagues, and events, emphasizing both high-tech practice spaces and a welcoming atmosphere for families and individuals.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art Trackman and Toptracer technology for precise data and immersive simulation experiences
Extensive practice facilities, including a massive Himalayas-style putting green and dedicated chipping areas
Flexible membership options tailored to individual, family, junior, and senior golfers
Host of events and leagues for both casual players and competitive golfers
Junior programs and youth-focused initiatives promoting golf education and community

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food service on-site; BYOB policy not specified.
No mention of alcohol service on-site; BYOB policy not specified.

simulator_hardware.notes: Installed in two indoor/outdoor simulator bays for advanced ball and club tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The facility provides a wide range of clubs for use, including left-handed bays, but players are welcome to bring their own equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: BYOB policy is not specified, but the venue hosts events and pavilions, suggesting outside food may be permitted for private gatherings.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on a simulator?
faq.answer: Standard 18-hole simulator sessions typically take 60-90 minutes, depending on player pace and course selection.

faq.question: Is TriGolf kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility is highly kid-friendly, offering junior programs, youth equipment, birthday party spaces, and family-oriented amenities.
